Explanation: The clues point to Osamu Tezuka, a renowned manga artist and animator, often called the "God of Manga." His works, such as Astro Boy, were serialized in magazines and adapted into animated series. Tezuka was also a qualified medical doctor (businessman/storyteller). The broadcaster for Astro Boy, Fuji TV, was listed in the first section of the Tokyo Stock Exchange in the 1990s. According to [74540], Osamu Tezuka was born in Toyonaka, Osaka Prefecture, Japan.
Exact Answer: Toyonaka, Osaka Prefecture, Japan
Confidence: 100%
